title: Golden Globes 2026 Predictions | Winners List - Filmibeat
text: Filmibeat's Golden Globes 2026 predictions cover all major categories including television awards. In the television drama actress category, the predictions included Rhea Seehorn ("Pluribus"), Britt Lower ("Severance"), Kathy Bates ("Matlock"), Helen Mirren ("Mobland"), Bella Ramsey ("The Last of Us"), and Keri Russell ("The Diplomat"). The comprehensive predictions article provided analysis of frontrunners and potential upsets across the 83rd Golden Globe Awards, emphasizing that Rhea Seehorn was positioning herself as a strong contender in the television drama actress category heading into the January 11, 2026 ceremony.
